response.justification: Maria has extensive experience as a senior full-stack and backend software engineer, but lacks the specialized hardware, SoC design, and deep-learning accelerator optimization experience required for this Principal Performance Architect role. Her background is primarily in web services, GIS, and general software development rather than the hardware-software co-design and silicon-level performance analysis needed for AI accelerators.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience, easily meeting the BS + 8 years requirement.
Experience with low-latency applications and software performance optimization in microservices using DLang and Asynchronous I/O.
Strong track record of technical leadership and architectural design in web and cloud platforms.
concerns: Zero mentioned experience with SoC, IP modeling, or hardware-software co-design.
Lacks required expertise in deep learning workloads, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator performance analysis.
No background in SIMD/MIMD architectures or silicon-level power-optimization trade-offs.
